# model-registry

> model-registry is a Kubernetes component. deploying 3 workload(s) (model-catalog-server, minio, controller-manager) with 3 container(s). watching 1 resource type(s). exposing 1 service(s) on ports: 8080. Dockerfile EXPOSE ports: 8080. connecting to external services: gcs, mongodb, mysql, postgres, sqlite. runtime dependencies: MinIO/S3, MongoDB, MySQL, OpenTelemetry Collector, PostgreSQL, S3. Python k8s client with 53 API call(s). integrates with Istio, management relationship via labels/annotations. references components: kserve (import), kubeflow (import). mounts 1 ConfigMap(s) as volumes: model-catalog-sources.
